epicT1075Reproducer.description: WAL-reset corruption class (brain.db errcode=11) fixed in SQLite 3.53.0

coldStartBudget.scope: DB-substrate contribution only (open consolidated file + briefing-class query set)
coldStartBudget.note: Isolated from Node/CLI process overhead. Full `cleo briefing` subprocess latency (~6-8s, dominated by module-load + dispatch) is tracked separately as T11292 and is orthogonal to the DB-substrate decision.
